description.english: Complete all of a planet's quests after having 8 simultaneous open missions.
description.japanese: 目標を8個同時に解放した状態で惑星の修復を完了
description.schinese: 在同时激活8个目标的情况下完成建造
description.spanish: Complete a planet after having 8 simultaneous open missions.
description.tchinese: 在同時啟用8個目標的情況下完成建造

description.english: Complete 200 missions or more during your whole game history.
description.japanese: 合計で目標を200個達成
description.schinese: 游戏累计完成200个目标
description.spanish: Complete 200 missions or more during your whole game history.
description.tchinese: 遊戲累計完成200個目標

description.english: Complete 100 quests during your whole game history.
description.japanese: 合計でミッションを100個達成
description.schinese: 累计完成100个任务
description.spanish: Complete 100 quests during your whole game history.
description.tchinese: 累計完成100個任務

description.english: Have a platinum star on every single planet.
description.japanese: すべての惑星でプラチナスターを獲得
description.schinese: 获得所有星球的白金之星
description.spanish: Have a platinum star on every single planet.
description.tchinese: 獲得所有星球的白金之星

description.english: Complete all of a planet's quests and earn your first platinum star.
description.japanese: 惑星の修復を完了し、初めてプラチナスターを獲得
description.schinese: 完成星球修复并获得首枚白金之星
description.spanish: Comple a planet and earn your first platinum star.
description.tchinese: 完成星球修復並獲得首枚白金之星

description.english: Complete all of a planet's quests without ever rotating a tile.
description.japanese: タイルを回転せずに惑星の修復を完了
description.schinese: 在全程未旋转砖块的情况下完成建造
description.spanish: Complete a planet without ever rotating a tile.
description.tchinese: 在全程未旋轉磚塊的情況下完成建造

description.english: Reach maximum friendship level with Bass.
description.japanese: ベースと最高友情レベルに到達
description.schinese: 与贝斯达成最高友谊等级
description.spanish: Reach maximum friendship level with Bass.
description.tchinese: 與貝斯達成最高友誼等級

description.english: Make 15 consecutive moves joining only compatible borders.
description.japanese: マッチする端だけを連続15回合わせる
description.schinese: 连续15次接连摆放砖块
description.spanish: Make 15 consecutive moves joining only compatible borders.
description.tchinese: 連續15次接連擺放磚塊

description.english: Water 500 flowers on a single planet.
description.japanese: 1つの惑星で500本の花に水をあげる
description.schinese: 在单颗星球上浇灌500朵花
description.spanish: Water 500 flowers on a single planet.
description.tchinese: 在單顆星球上澆灌500朵花

description.english: Reach a 2000 high score.
description.japanese: 2000のハイスコアに到達
description.schinese: 最高分达到2000
description.spanish: Reach a 2000 high score.
description.tchinese: 最高分達到2000

description.english: Complete the Bun Star System to 100%.
description.japanese: バン星系のコンプ率100%
description.schinese: 将蹦蹦星系完成度提升至100%
description.spanish: Complete the Bun Star System to 100%.
description.tchinese: 將蹦蹦星系完成度提升至100%

description.english: Complete all of a planet's quests while only having one group for each color.
description.japanese: それぞれの色を1グループのみ残した状態で惑星の修復を完了
description.schinese: 在每种颜色全连接的情况下完成建造
description.spanish: Complete a planet while only having one group for each color.
description.tchinese: 在每種顏色全連接的情況下完成建造

description.english: Make a group of 20 or more tiles of the same color.
description.japanese: 20個以上の同色タイルのグループをつくる
description.schinese: 连接20个及以上同色砖块
description.spanish: Make a group of 20 or more tiles of the same color.
description.tchinese: 連接20個及以上同色磚塊

description.english: Complete the Cor Star System to 100%.
description.japanese: コー星系のコンプ率100%
description.schinese: 将搬砖星系完成度提升至100%
description.spanish: Complete the Cor Star System to 100%.
description.tchinese: 將搬磚星系完成度提升至100%

description.english: Survive for 5 consecutive turns with less than 3 tiles in your hand.
description.japanese: 手持ちタイルが3個未満の状態で、連続5ターン続ける
description.schinese: 手砖少于3个的情况下，持续建造5回合
description.spanish: Survive for 5 consecutive turns with less than 3 tiles in your hand.
description.tchinese: 手磚少於3個的情況下，持續建造5回合

description.english: Finish all of a planet's quests in the first 25 turns or less.
description.japanese: 25ターン以内に1つの惑星の全ミッションを達成
description.schinese: 25次放置内完成一颗星球的所有任务
description.spanish: Finish all of a planet's quests in the first 25 turns or less.
description.tchinese: 25次放置內完成一顆星球的所有任務

description.english: Complete all of a planet's quests with only compatible borders.
description.japanese: マッチする辺のみをつなげた状態で惑星の修復を完了
description.schinese: 保持接连摆放的情况下完成建造
description.spanish: Complete a planet with only compatible borders.
description.tchinese: 保持接連擺放的情況下完成建造

description.english: Complete a planet in 3 minutes or less.
description.japanese: 3分以内に惑星を修復
description.schinese: 在3分钟内完成建造
description.spanish: Complete a planet in 3 minutes or less.
description.tchinese: 在3分鐘內完成建造

description.english: Score 1200 points in 3 minutes or less.

description.tchinese: 在3分鐘內獲得1200分

description.english: Complete the Flo Star System to 100%.

description.english: Reach 60 tiles or more in your deck.

description.english: Have a 2000 high score or higher on all planets.
